violations.details: TransformData expects raw_data as input, but its signature only takes transform_config. It does not receive raw_data from IngestData or any other source.
ValidateData expects processed_data as input, but its signature takes no arguments. It does not receive processed_data from TransformData.
ExportData expects processed_data and validation results, but its signature only takes export_format. It does not receive processed_data or quality scores.

composition_feedback.suggested_fix: Redesign child signatures to accept and return data explicitly. For example: IngestData(source) -> raw_data, TransformData(raw_data, transform_config) -> processed_data, ValidateData(processed_data) -> validated_data, ExportData(validated_data, export_format) -> result. Then OrchestratePipeline can chain them properly.
